keywords.name: I am Velvet. How can I help you?
keywords.job: I'm working here in this shop. Are you interested in any of our goods?
keywords.pillow: What color would you prefer? Red, green, blue or yellow?
keywords.small: What color would you prefer? Purple, green, red, blue, orange, turquoise or white?
keywords.round: What color would you prefer? Purple, red, blue or turquoise?
keywords.square: What color would you prefer? Red, green, blue or yellow?
keywords.curtain: Well, actually it's better to call them tapestries.
keywords.tapestr: Please tell me what color you would prefer: purple, green, yellow, orange, red, blue or white?

texts: I'm working here in this shop. Are you interested in any of our goods?

entries.response: Here you are.
I'm sorry, but you need a premium account if you want to buy furniture.
Come back, when you have enough money.
Hmm, but I'm sure, it would fit nicely into your house.
